required_fixes: Add hostname to WARM_SCHEMA and _RUNS_TABLE_SCHEMA DDL alongside COOL_SCHEMA, or document why warm schema diverges intentionally.
Add output_metadata TEXT column to _RUNS_TABLE_SCHEMA DDL in compact.py explicitly; the plan references it but never specifies the DDL migration for existing warm databases.

Task 142.1 Go/No-Go gate references WARM_SCHEMA output_metadata field but the current WARM_SCHEMA in schema.py has no such field — reconcile or provide the DDL ALTER TABLE path for existing databases.
Task 140.5 references line 178–181 of compact.py for warm_version INSERT; the current file has no such lines — update anchor to match real code location before implementation.

Integration test (Task 11) gate says 'init → run → compact → archive → check' but checker.py --check-outputs is Task 142.3; the gate will be false until 142.3 is done — decouple or sequence Task 11 after all of Batch 3.
T6–T10 all modify docs/source/index.rst; the batch must sequence those edits or designate one writer to own index.rst and merge from other tasks

T13 (publish workflow) depends on T12 but T14 (configure secrets) depends on T13 — make T14 depend on T13 only, and allow T12/T13 to run in parallel where possible; more critically T13 workflow YAML references a secret that won't exist until T14, so T14 must be done before the workflow is actually triggered (sequence T14 before E3)

FastMCP spec gap: plan lists 6 tools in Section 1 (list_runs, get_run, find_runs, run_sql, check_runs, compact_catalog) but CHANGELOG gate in T3 lists different names (ls/show/find/sql etc.) — reconcile naming to a canonical list

T19 depends on T16/T17/T18 (listed in plan) but T17 already depends on T16; the stated dep 'T15, T16, T17, T18' for T19 is correct but the dep for T17 says 'T15, T16' — add explicit note that T19 transitively needs T16 and that T18 is independent of T17 (not dependent)

Section 6 has 16 gates listed but Section 1 Phase 5 says 15+; count the post-install smoke test gate (gate 16) which has no explicit task covering it — add a T24b or extend T24 to run bth init/bth run/bth ls/bth-mcp as a smoke sequence, not just --help
